name: M-Pesa
description: M-Pesa — Safaricom's Kenya-originated mobile money platform covering East Africa with STK push, C2B, B2C, and API integration.

seo.title: M-Pesa — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: M-Pesa: M-Pesa — Safaricom's Kenya-originated mobile money platform covering East Africa with STK push, C2B, B2C, and API integration.

when_to_use: STK push payment collection from Kenyan mobile money users via Daraja API
C2B and B2C M-Pesa payment flows for East African e-commerce and services
Salary disbursements and mass payouts to M-Pesa wallets in Kenya/Tanzania
Recurring M-Pesa payment for subscription services in East Africa

pros: Default mobile money in Kenya and East Africa
STK push gives strong mobile UX
C2B, B2C, and B2B flows via API
Massive reach — tens of millions of users
cons: Daraja API quirky and sometimes unreliable
Rate limits and sandbox feel dated
review.verdict: Non-negotiable for East Africa — deal with Daraja quirks because reach and consumer trust are unmatched.
review.best_for: Merchants and platforms serving Kenya, Tanzania, and East Africa
review.not_for: Teams outside East Africa or wanting modern DX
